_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: mice treated orally twice daily with 50 mg/kg VS-4718 exhibited 56% tumor growth inhibition on day 35 as compared to vehicle-treated control animals (p=0.0089)
details: 50 mg/kg orally twice daily resulted in 56% tumor growth inhibition on day 35 in Merlin-negative PDX model (p=0.0089)
